data.content: Approved in implementation_review. The remaining branch change constrains ReTakes row titles so long titles cannot widen the centered page container: src/components/retake-row-parts.tsx adds min-w-0 on the title row wrapper and flex-1 min-w-0 truncation on the clickable/static title element. Existing coverage already verifies the shared scrollbar-gutter stabilization for cross-view header positioning in src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts, and this branch adds src/lib/__tests__/retake-row-layout.test.ts to lock in the ReTakes-specific shrink behavior. Verified in worktree commit aa1951bc2f012a86537649d7499d5aea54837c12 with bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build; all passed.
